Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-33079 affecting package python-mistune for versions less than 3.2.1-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-33079 affecting package python-mistune for versions less than 3.2.1-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-mistune is earlier than 3.2.1-1, affected by CVE-2026-33079
